hooks.command: cd /Users/lorcan/nix-config && echo '=== nix-config session start ===' && echo && git log --oneline -3 && echo && git status --short

echo '{"systemMessage": "Before ending: (1) were any decisions made this session? If yes, each needs an ADR-lite entry in DECISIONS.md plus a one-line pointer added to PROJECT_STATUS.md decision log index. (2) Does PROJECT_STATUS.md backlog / in-flight / known-issues reflect what changed this session?"}'
